title: OCS/GCS qconf common definitions
description: Shared $defs referenced by the per-object ocs-qconf-*.schema.json files describing the JSON produced and consumed by qconf -fmt json.

scalarValue.description: A typed attribute value. Plain strings, numbers and booleans are emitted natively. TIME/MEM values are rendered as unit/colon strings (compact, the default) or as numbers (seconds/bytes, with -fmtval numeric); an unlimited value is the string "INFINITY". An unset string attribute is the empty string. On input any of these forms is accepted.

nameList.description: A list of names (e.g. an access list, project list or host reference list).

namedValue.description: A name/value entry, e.g. one complex value, threshold, load value or parameter.
